name: Strawberry Patch Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites until stiff.
2. Gradually add sugar and mace to the egg whites, beating well after each addition.
3. Add vanilla; combine crushed crackers, baking powder, and nuts with the egg white mixture.
4. Fold the combined ingredients into the beaten egg whites.
5. Spoon the batter into a buttered 10-inch pie plate, pressing it to conform to the shape of the plate.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes. Cool completely.
1. Combine crushed strawberries, sugar, and lemon peel in a bowl.
2. Soften gelatin in cold water using gentle heat.
3. Once softened, gently warm the gelatin mixture until it dissolves.
4. Add the gelatin to the berry mixture and chill until it begins to thicken.
5. Spread half of the chilled mixture over the cooled crust.
6. Arrange whole strawberries stem-end down on top of the chilled mixture.
7. Carefully spoon the remaining chilled berry mixture around the strawberries.
8. Chill the pie until firm. Serve with whipped cream, if desired.
